sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24019" key="dendra/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δενδρ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24019.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wooded,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λόχμη</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:13:399" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.399</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαίτη</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11:514" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.514</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
